Read one ordered append-log page without assigning replay or restore semantics.

## Import

```ts
import { readAppendLogPage } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function readAppendLogPage(
	log: AppendLogStorageTier<T>,
	opts: AppendLogReadOptions = {},
): Promise<AppendLogPage<T>>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `log` | `AppendLogStorageTier<T>` | log value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `AppendLogReadOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `Promise<AppendLogPage<T>>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { readAppendLogPage } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/storage/append-log.ts`
